signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation** | YES | HIGH confidence

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board held its benchmark interest rate at 2.5% for a seventh consecutive month on Friday, April 10, 2026, citing external risk factors and inflationary pressures.[3] This decision came as South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, driven largely by surging
